rules.message: ZIP extraction completed without unsafe paths.
A results manifest or gate summary is present.
Partition hashes checked for accidental identity.
Claim state compared with execution evidence.

evidence.claim_status: Five-seed v1.1.1 bridge-isolation pilot completed. Protocol-integrity gates passed. Route-swap ordering and prediction-identity preservation passed. Held-out nominal mediation, held-out functional mediation, local continuity, functional causal specificity, and operational non-degradation did not qualify.

claims.statement: The inferred context has replicated representational geometry.
The tested router improves held-out nominal route order.
The tested router improves held-out functional route order under a common cost matrix.
The router reduces high-tail local sensitivity without route collapse.
Factor-tangent interventions are functionally more specific than orthogonal controls.
Stable functional host specialization is established.
The routing intervention stays within the preregistered non-degradation margin.
The routing intervention improves operational performance.
The primary smooth residual treatment reduces held-out common-cost functional stress.
Regularized covariance geometry adds factor-discrimination value beyond centroid-only context geometry.
